ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the county */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the county */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic category */,
  "race_ethnicity" TEXT /* Race or ethnicity of the demographic group */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the demographic category (e.g., 0-17, 18-49, 50+) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the demographic category (e.g., Male, Female, Non-binary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic group */,
  "people_vaccinated_one_dose" INTEGER /* Number of people vaccinated with at least one dose */,
  "people_fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people fully vaccinated */,
  "doses_administered" INTEGER /* Total number of doses administered */,
  "people_vaccinated_booster" INTEGER /* Number of people vaccinated with at least one booster dose */,
  "vaccination_rate_one_dose" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated with at least one dose */,
  "vaccination_rate_fully_vaccinated" REAL /* Percentage of the population fully vaccinated */,
  "vaccination_rate_booster" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated with at least one booster dose */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_over_time" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data record in the vaccination_data table */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "people_vaccinated_one_dose" INTEGER /* Number of people vaccinated with at least one dose */,
  "people_fully_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Number of people fully vaccinated */,
  "doses_administered" INTEGER /* Total number of doses administered */,
  "people_vaccinated_booster" INTEGER /* Number of people vaccinated with at least one booster dose */,
  "vaccination_rate_one_dose" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated with at least one dose */,
  "vaccination_rate_fully_vaccinated" REAL /* Percentage of the population fully vaccinated */,
  "vaccination_rate_booster" REAL /* Percentage of the population vaccinated with at least one booster dose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_over_time_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES vaccination_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry clerk, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., dataset, report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the report was last modified */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
